title: thouinia domingensis var. deflexa
intro: Thouinia domingensis var. deflexa, also known as the Dominican Thouinia, is a plant species within the family Burseraceae, native to the Caribbean region. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Thouinia domingensis var. deflexa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
